pattern: Recording each range update as a +seats at the start and a -seats just past the end turns many overlapping range adds into a single prefix-sum sweep.
hints: Adding the same amount to a whole contiguous block can be deferred: mark only where the addition begins and where it stops.
Keep a difference array: at the first flight add the seats, at one past the last flight subtract them, so a later running total reconstructs each flight's value.
Build an array of size n+1, do diff[first-1] += seats and diff[last] -= seats for every booking, then take the prefix sum and drop the trailing slot.

edge_inputs.description: single booking spanning the whole range
booking ending at last flight must not bleed past the array
some flights receive no bookings and stay zero
max seat value on a multi-flight range

stress.description: many random overlapping bookings over a large flight count
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    m = max(1, size)
    bookings = []
    for _ in range(m):
        a = rng.randint(1, n)
        b = rng.randint(a, n)
        s = rng.randint(1, 10000)
        bookings.append([a, b, s])
    return [bookings, n]
stress.note: ranges chosen so first <= last <= n always holds
